## utm-dev generate-test-icon

Generate a test icon for a Gio project.

### Synopsis

Generate a test icon for a Gio project. If no directory is specified, uses 'example-gio-app'.

```
utm-dev generate-test-icon [app-directory] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for generate-test-icon
```
